description: Checked-in synthetic 20-case live image-backed latency slice used for Gemini hot-path benchmarking beyond the default core-six baseline.

cases.title: Perfect Spirit Label
cases.scenario: baseline happy path

cases.title: Spirit Label With Warning Errors
cases.scenario: government warning title case plus punctuation defect

cases.title: Spirit Label With Brand Name Case Mismatch
cases.scenario: cosmetic brand mismatch should downgrade to review, not fail

cases.title: Wine Label Missing Appellation
cases.scenario: vintage and varietal present without appellation

cases.title: Beer Label With Forbidden ABV Format
cases.scenario: ABV uses forbidden format

cases.title: Low Quality Image
cases.scenario: blurry or low-confidence extraction should surface review

cases.title: Perfect Beer Label
cases.scenario: beer-specific happy path without ABV requirement

cases.title: Beer With Geographic Style Unqualified
cases.scenario: foreign geographic style name without style qualifier

cases.title: Wine With Multiple Varietals Valid
cases.scenario: compliant multi-varietal wine

cases.title: Wine With Multiple Varietals Invalid Total
cases.scenario: varietal percentages total 90 instead of 100

cases.title: Wine Label Table Wine Exemption
cases.scenario: table wine designation stands in for explicit ABV

cases.title: Spirits With ABV Abbreviation
cases.scenario: same forbidden ABV abbreviation rule applied to spirits

cases.title: Spirits Net Contents In U.S. Measures
cases.scenario: spirits use U.S. measures instead of metric standards of fill

cases.title: Beer Net Contents In Metric Primary
cases.scenario: metric-primary net contents should downgrade to review

cases.title: Spirits Proof Not In Parentheses
cases.scenario: proof is not distinguished from the percentage statement

cases.title: Imported Spirit Without Country Of Origin
cases.scenario: imported product omits a country-of-origin statement

cases.title: Whisky Under 4 Years Without Age Statement
cases.scenario: age claim language is ambiguous without a clear numeric statement

cases.title: Wine With Varietal But No Appellation
cases.scenario: varietal designation appears without appellation

cases.title: Wine With Vintage And Appellation
cases.scenario: compliant vintage and appellation counterpart to the missing-appellation case

cases.title: Government Warning Completely Missing
cases.scenario: label omits the government warning entirely
